name: formatDate
description: A collection of date formatting utilities using dayjs for consistent date display across the application.
usage_guidelines: Use formatDate for standard date formatting with custom format strings.
Use formatDateTime for date with time display.
Use formatRelativeTime for human-readable relative times (e.g., '2 hours ago').
Use isValidDate to validate date inputs before formatting.
Always handle empty or invalid dates gracefully.

params.name: format
params.description: Dayjs format string (only for formatDate function).

return_value.description: Formatted date string, or empty string if date is invalid/empty.

Do: Use consistent format strings across app
Dont: Don't use native Date methods directly
